# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security fixes are best-effort for the latest development state and the most recent GitHub Release.

## Reporting A Vulnerability

Please avoid opening a public issue for a security problem if it includes exploit details or sensitive information.

If GitHub private vulnerability reporting is enabled for this repository, use that first.

If it is not available, contact the maintainer privately through the contact channel listed on the maintainer's GitHub profile. If you cannot reach the maintainer privately, open a public issue only after removing exploit details and sensitive material.

## Current Distribution Notes

stillmd is currently distributed without Developer ID signing and notarization. That is a distribution limitation, not an invitation to ignore genuine security concerns. Please report security issues responsibly.
